airbnb.name: Epic Penthouse | Private Rooftop | Condesa
airbnb.address: 501, Fernando Montes de Oca 136, Mexico City, Mexico City, 06140, MX

entrances.vehicle: Zamora 129 (3 parking spaces — contact host to arrange)

directions.pedestrian: At main entrance, take the ramp on your right for luggage. Walk straight to the wall, turn left, then right toward the elevator. Take elevator to 5th floor, turn right, walk to end of hallway — Apt 501.
directions.vehicle: After parking, take the first elevator on your left to the 5th floor. Turn right, proceed to end of hallway — Apt 501.

houseManual.lockNote: Inside, manually bolt the door. To lock from outside, press the access button on the keypad.

amenities.jacuzzi: Set temperature to 37–38°C. Overhead lights: switch on the power outlet. No sunscreen in the jacuzzi.
amenities.patioUmbrella: Lit by a solar-charged battery — use the switch on its side.
amenities.extraBedding: Floor mattresses under queen beds (2 per room). Extra blankets in room closets.
amenities.gym: S floor, open 6 AM – 10 PM daily.

houseManual.cleaning: Extra cleaning available at 800 pesos/session, paid directly to the cleaning team.
houseManual.trash: Dispose on S floor, in the garbage repository next to the car entrance ramp.

events.name: Land at MEX Airport
events.notes: Terminal 1. Grab pesos at the ATM in arrivals — better rate than the exchange booth.

events.name: Check in at Airbnb
events.notes: Condominio Pelotari, Apt 501 Tower A. Door code: 3030. Check-in after 3 PM.

events.name: Lunch: Chilpa or Ojo de Agua
events.notes: Chilpa is a cozy spot for traditional Mexican dishes. Ojo de Agua has healthy bowls and juices.

events.name: Parque Mexico loop, shopping, churros
events.notes: Walk the Art Deco park loop, browse shops on Tamaulipas, grab churros from a street vendor.

events.name: Dinner: Tacos la Chula
events.notes: Great casual taco spot in the neighborhood.

events.name: Handshake Speakeasy
events.notes: World-famous speakeasy. Reservation booked for 9 PM.

events.name: Teotihuacan pickup
events.notes: Pickup from Airbnb between 4:10–5:00 AM. Visita Teotihuacan, booking ref 1381123137. 6 adults. Call +525549320667 if needed.

events.name: Hot air balloon flight
events.notes: 30–50 min flight over Teotihuacan. Sparkling wine toast + flight certificate included. Max 100kg/person.

events.name: Cave breakfast
events.notes: Breakfast in an ancient cave — included in the all-inclusive package.

events.name: Teotihuacan pyramids
events.notes: Pyramid access included. Climb the Pyramid of the Sun and Moon, walk the Avenue of the Dead.

events.name: Maguey & obsidian workshop
events.notes: Includes liquor tasting. Then van ride back to CDMX (~11:30 AM return).

events.name: Lunch: Taco tour
events.notes: Hit Pescadita, Orinoco, and Califa for a proper CDMX taco crawl.

events.name: Dinner: Cuerno
events.notes: Restaurant on Av. Presidente Masaryk in Polanco.

events.name: Limantour
events.notes: World's 50 Best Bars list. Creative cocktails, great vibe.

events.name: Brunch: San Angel Inn
events.notes: Historic hacienda restaurant in San Angel. Beautiful courtyard setting.

events.name: Bazar Sabado
events.notes: Famous Saturday artisan market in Plaza San Jacinto, San Angel. Great crafts and folk art.

events.name: Frida Kahlo Museum (Casa Azul)
events.notes: Frida's actual home in Coyoacán. Tickets pre-purchased for 1:30 PM. No large bags allowed.

events.name: Dinner: Contramar
events.notes: Iconic seafood spot. Get the tuna tostadas and the red/green grilled fish.

events.name: Librería Valladolid
events.notes: Hidden speakeasy behind a bookshelf. Great cocktails in Roma Norte.

events.name: Brunch: Casa de los Azulejos
events.notes: Stunning tiled 18th-century palace in Centro. Now a Sanborns restaurant. Beautiful courtyard.

events.name: Panaderia Rosetta / La Esquina
events.notes: Best bakery in the city. Grab guava rolls and a cortado.

events.name: Diego Rivera murals & Zocalo
events.notes: See the famous murals at Palacio Nacional. Walk the massive Zocalo plaza in Centro Historico.

events.name: Xochimilco
events.notes: Colorful trajinera boats on ancient Aztec canals. About 45 min south of Centro.

events.name: Dinner: Huset
events.notes: Nordic-Mexican restaurant in Condesa.

events.name: Free morning
events.notes: Sleep in, grab coffee, walk the neighborhood one last time. Check the Explore tab for nearby spots!

events.name: Dinner: TBD
events.notes: Last dinner — pick a favorite from the trip or try somewhere new.

events.name: Bars: TBD
events.notes: Last night out. Check the Explore tab for options.

places.name: Campobaja
places.note: Per Sharon — highly recommended. Friend went a couple weeks ago and loved it.

places.name: Las Gorditas del Guero
places.note: Sharon saw it in Bon Appétit.

places.name: Voraz
places.note: Sharon saw this in Bon Appétit.

places.name: Expendio de Maiz
places.note: Buzin and Julia said would be fun with our parents. Corn-based Mexican cuisine.

places.name: La Única CDMX
places.note: Jason Golnick said it is good.

places.name: Esquina Común
places.note: Reddit says amazing. Must contact to book.

places.name: Cariñito Tacos
places.note: Reddit says insanely good.

places.name: La Esquina Del Chilaquil
places.note: Chilaquiles sandwiches.

places.name: Tacos La Chula
places.note: Excellent cheap tacos near the Airbnb.

places.name: Tizne Tacomotora
places.note: Jeff says barbecued tacos.

places.name: Ojo de Agua
places.note: Healthy and delicious bowls and juices.

places.name: El Pescadito Roma
places.note: Fish tacos. Part of the taco tour.

places.name: Jenni's Street Quesadillas
places.note: Venkat loves this spot.

places.name: Café La Blanca
places.note: Locally recommended. OG Mexican diner.

places.name: Tortería Los Güeros
places.note: All tortas all the time.

places.name: Taquería El Califa
places.note: ADR recommends. Classic CDMX taquería.

places.name: El Parnita
places.note: MJ recommends.

places.name: Maximo
places.note: MJ recommends. Farm-to-table, daily changing menu.

places.name: El Habanerito
places.note: Good casual spot in Roma.

places.name: Fonda Margarita
places.note: Huge line, authentic Mexican breakfast. Worth the wait.

places.name: Mercado de San Juan
places.note: Famous food market. Great for exotic meats and fresh seafood.

places.name: Birria Estilo Jalisco
places.note: Must-do street tacos. Birria done right.

places.name: Churrería El Moro
places.note: Best churros in town. Been around forever.

places.name: Los Cocuyos
places.note: Late night street tacos in Centro.

places.name: Taquería Orinoco
places.note: Everyone recommends. Monterrey-style tacos, chicharrón prensado is a must.

places.name: Contramar
places.note: Iconic seafood. Tuna tostadas and the red/green grilled fish are must-orders.

places.name: Huset
places.note: Nordic-Mexican restaurant.

places.name: Entremar
places.note: Seafood spot.

places.name: Chilpa
places.note: Cozy spot for traditional Mexican dishes.

places.name: Cafe De Tacuba
places.note: Historic restaurant. Operating since 1912.

places.name: Em
places.note: Fine dining spot.

places.name: Galanga
places.note: Thai food in Roma.

places.name: Pujol
places.note: World-famous tasting menu. The mole madre is legendary.

places.name: Quintonil
places.note: World's 50 Best. Modern Mexican fine dining.

places.name: Forte
places.note: Good restaurant in Roma.

places.name: Panadería Rosetta
places.note: MJ recommends. Guava roll is what they're known for but the corn ricotta muffin is even better.

places.name: Lalo!
places.note: Great brunch. Expect a line on weekends.

places.name: Lardo
places.note: Good restaurant in Condesa.

places.name: Cuerno
places.note: Restaurant on Masaryk in Polanco.

places.name: San Angel Inn
places.note: Historic hacienda restaurant. Beautiful courtyard.

places.name: Casa de los Azulejos
places.address: Av. Francisco I. Madero 4, Centro Histórico
places.note: Stunning tiled 18th-century palace. Great brunch in the courtyard.

places.name: Maizajo
places.note: Michelin recommended taco shop near the Airbnb. Previous Airbnb guests rave about it.

places.name: Handshake Speakeasy
places.note: Top 50 bar in the world. World-famous speakeasy.

places.name: Hanky Panky Cocktail Bar
places.note: Must do. Go Man Go drink is great. Top 50 in the world.

places.name: Limantour
places.note: World's 50 Best Bars list. Creative cocktails, great vibe.

places.name: Librería Valladolid
places.note: Hidden speakeasy behind a bookshelf.

places.name: Baltra Bar
places.note: Jeff says great bar for dessert drinks.

places.name: Gin Gin Álvaro Obregón
places.note: Good spot for drinks.

places.name: Ladina Bar
places.note: Cool little vibey bar. Usually pretty empty though.

places.name: Deleted Souls
places.note: Local recommended bar.

places.name: Blanco Colima
places.note: Cool vibe bar.

places.name: Xaman Bar
places.note: Downstairs kind of dark but cool bar.

places.name: Supra Roma Rooftop
places.note: Jeff, Jenny, MJ all recommend. Rooftop bar.

places.name: Balmori Roofbar
places.note: Rooftop bar in Roma.

places.name: Toledo Rooftop
places.note: Rooftop bar.

places.name: Terraza Catedral
places.note: Rooftop overlooking the Zocalo and Cathedral.

places.name: Jazzatlan Capital
places.note: Jazz bar in Roma.

places.name: Tokyo Music Bar
places.note: Music bar.

places.name: Gran Hotel Ciudad de México
places.note: A must if you're in Centro. Amazing architecture and a balcony overlooking the Zocalo. Go for food or drinks.

places.name: Qūentin Café
places.note: Coffee shop in Roma.

places.name: Frëims
places.note: Coffee spot in Condesa.

places.name: Departamento
places.note: Cozy neighborhood coffee shop.

places.name: Teotihuacan Pyramids
places.address: San Juan Teotihuacán, State of Mexico
places.note: Ancient pyramids ~1 hour north of CDMX. Climb the Pyramid of the Sun and Moon.

places.name: Frida Kahlo Museum (Casa Azul)
places.note: Frida's actual home. Buy tickets online in advance — they sell out.

places.name: Bazar Sabado
places.note: Saturday artisan market. Great crafts, folk art, and food stalls.

places.name: Xochimilco
places.note: Colorful trajinera boats on ancient Aztec canals. A must-do CDMX experience.

places.name: Diego Rivera Murals (Palacio Nacional)
places.address: Plaza de la Constitución S/N, Centro Histórico
places.note: Famous murals depicting Mexican history. Free admission. Right on the Zocalo.

places.name: Zocalo
places.address: Plaza de la Constitución, Centro Histórico
places.note: Massive central plaza. One of the largest public squares in the world.

places.name: Parque México
places.note: Beautiful Art Deco park in Condesa. Near the Airbnb.

places.name: Parque España
places.note: Right next to the Airbnb. Nice park for a quick stroll.

places.name: Palacio de Bellas Artes
places.note: Art Nouveau/Deco masterpiece. Rivera and Orozco murals inside. Near the Chinatown Gate.

places.name: Chinatown Gate
places.note: Nice to walk through. Near Palacio de Bellas Artes.

places.name: Museo Nacional de Antropología
places.address: Av. Paseo de la Reforma, Chapultepec
places.note: World-class museum. The Aztec Sun Stone alone is worth the visit. Allow 3+ hours.

places.name: Chapultepec Castle
places.note: Castle on a hill with panoramic city views. Great murals inside.

places.name: Goodbye Folk Vintage Boutique
places.note: Vintage shop in Roma.

places.name: Lozartmx
places.note: Ceramics shop.

places.name: La Ciudadela Market
places.note: Best spot for souvenirs. Huge variety of folk art, ceramics, textiles.

places.name: FONART
places.address: Av. Paseo de la Reforma 116, Juárez
places.note: Government-run folk art store. Fair trade, high quality, fixed prices.

phrases.spanish: Una mesa para cuatro, por favor
phrases.phonetic: OO-nah MEH-sah PAH-rah KWAH-troh, por fah-VOR

phrases.english: Can I have the check, please?
phrases.phonetic: meh TRA-eh la KWEN-tah, por fah-VOR

phrases.english: To the right / To the left
phrases.spanish: A la derecha / A la izquierda
phrases.phonetic: ah la deh-REH-chah / ah la ees-kee-AIR-dah

phrases.english: Can you take me to this address?
phrases.phonetic: meh PWEH-deh yeh-VAR ah ES-tah dee-rek-see-ON

phrases.english: Can you give me a better price?

phrases.spanish: Llame a un doctor / una ambulancia
phrases.phonetic: YAH-meh ah oon dok-TOR / OO-nah ahm-boo-LAHN-see-ah
DON-deh eh-STAH el os-pee-TAHL mahs ser-KAH-no
